text.title: strategy-analysis-business-need Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for strategy-analysis-business-need as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Solution dressed as need: "we need a new CRM" or "we need a new system".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hard-codes a solution choice before the gap analysis has been done; blocks exploration of build/buy/partner/modify options.

failure-mode.description: Vague business need: "We need to be more efficient" or "We need to improve."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Unmeasurable needs cannot be used to validate future states, prioritize gaps, or track closure; they become political documents.

failure-mode.description: No strategic alignment: the initiative does not connect to any named corporate goal.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Initiatives without goal traces lose budget battles and get de-prioritized when resources are constrained.

failure-mode.description: Strategy analysis becomes the project: months of frame-current-future-gap iteration with no commitment.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Analysis-paralysis. Time-box every phase; publish v0.1 in days not weeks. Frame phase cap: 1 week.
